name: web-access
description: Use Kimi built-in web search to retrieve fresh public-web information. This is the preferred way to look up facts, news, prices, or any text-based knowledge from the internet.
when_to_use: Use this skill for current facts, recent events, prices, schedules, or when the user explicitly asks to search online.
Use this skill when the answer should be verified against external sources instead of relying only on memory.
This is the FIRST CHOICE for any internet information retrieval. Do NOT open a browser to search for information.
This capability is already registered as a builtin tool. Do not browse the filesystem to look for it.
when_not_to_use: Do NOT use this skill when the user needs to interact with a visible web page (e.g., play music, fill a form, click buttons, log in to a website).
For browser interaction tasks, use chrome-browser-agent instead.
intent_examples: help me check the latest news
search the web for this information
please verify this online for me
